reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, el del servi compras muy maleducado,  grita que no mascotas, EL es un animal sueltoy desagradable, mi perra de minitoy de 1,800 arriba mio más educada que el personal de ahi.
Obvio y por suerte mo compré.
Pero lamentablemente tenes que cargar nafta ahí POR ESO SE ABUSAN

(Translated by Google)
Very bad service. The customer service guy is very rude, yelling "no pets." He's a loose and unpleasant animal. My $1,800 miniature dog is better behaved than the staff there.
Obviously, and luckily, I bought it.
But unfortunately, you have to fill up with gas there. That's why they're abusive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c0p1c2tRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La única estación de servicio en Santa Clara. En temporada tenés cola y reza que cuando te toque no se halla agotado el combustible de la cisterna

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in Santa Clara. During peak season, you'll have to wait in line, and you just have to pray that the tanker isn't out of fuel when your turn comes.

reviews.comment:
Es la unica estacion de bandera de santa clara, con lo cual esta casi siempre bastante concurrida. Son 4 surtidores en solo dos filas de autos. y tiene un lindo lugar par descansar con mesas y arboles. Quizas quedo un poco chica para los meses de verano pero no creo que le hagan una inversion en el proximo tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only branded gas station in Santa Clara, so it's almost always quite busy. There are four pumps in just two lanes of cars, and it has a nice rest area with tables and trees. It might be a bit small for the summer months, but I don't think they'll invest in it anytime soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5b05UdE13EAE
